subgoal: Tap the message body text ("Hi,") to focus the email body for typing
acceptance_criteria: Success means the email compose screen stays open and the message body field becomes the active input area (text cursor/caret appears in the body, or the body editor gains focus and the keyboard may appear). Recipient autocomplete suggestions, if shown, should dismiss or no longer be the active focus.

llm_result.reason: The compose screen remains visible, but there is no observable focus change to the message body: the UI tree is identical before/after, no caret/keyboard indication appears, and recipient autocomplete results remain present (suggesting focus did not move to the body).

notable_changes: No detectable UI/state change; autocomplete results did not dismiss; no evidence body editor gained focus

suspicious_signals: peoplekit_autocomplete_results_recyclerview still present (should vanish if focus moved to body)

final.reason: The compose screen remains visible, but there is no observable focus change to the message body: the UI tree is identical before/after, no caret/keyboard indication appears, and recipient autocomplete results remain present (suggesting focus did not move to the body).
